title: Medical Entry Starter
bestFor: FSc pre-medical students preparing for medical admission tests.
steps: Practise Biology, Chemistry and Physics samples.

title: Engineering & CS Starter
bestFor: Students preparing for FAST, NUST NET, ECAT, PIEAS, GIKI or CS admission tests.
steps: Attempt IQ and analytical reasoning samples.
Try FAST or NET sample mocks.

title: General Aptitude Route
bestFor: Students preparing for NAT, USAT, GAT General and scholarship aptitude tests.
steps: Attempt NAT or GAT mixed mock.

title: Law Admission Route
bestFor: Students preparing for LAT, Law GAT or LSAT-style reasoning tests.

title: English Proficiency Route
bestFor: Students preparing for IELTS, TOEFL or PTE.
steps: Start with reading main idea practice.
